calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-457 GOV-FANOUT-1 leg B (H-explore): z_world dense-teacher actor-critic
items.note: Reward-density axis: z_world (cotrain) actor-critic with a DENSE teacher, two arms -- potential-shaping RL + behavior-cloning of local_view_greedy (bc_action_match_accuracy is a direct z_world action-adequacy readout). 2x2 cell (z_world, dense). Null: a dense arm clears -> reward-sparsity was the wall; both sub-floor -> sparsity not sole wall (749 decides). GOV-FANOUT-1 leg from failure_autopsy_morning-digest-742-744a-745-746-746a_2026-07-13 (742 refuted 'single missing mechanism=MECH-457'; deficit UPSTREAM of the actor-critic head). DIAGNOSTIC -> excluded from governance scoring; route to /failure-autopsy before any governance action; MECH-457 stays candidate/v3_pending. Same-question 742 floor re-pose REFUSED (a different mechanism per leg). GOV-REUSE-1: decisive readout recorded in NO prior manifest (742 was z_world+sparse only) -> run. phase3-queue snapshot-race: verify git show --stat HEAD before push.

items.title: MECH-457 GOV-FANOUT-1 leg C (conjunction): raw-view dense-teacher actor-critic
items.note: Step 2.5b design-audit leg: closes the 747/748 verdict-aliasing gap (deeper-than-both vs need-the-conjunction). Raw 5x5 view AND dense teacher (shaping RL + BC), the empty (raw_view, dense) factorial cell. Null: an arm clears -> the conjunction is required; both sub-floor -> deeper than representation+reward-sparsity (escalate to H-optim/capacity, NOT a floor re-pose). GOV-FANOUT-1 leg from failure_autopsy_morning-digest-742-744a-745-746-746a_2026-07-13 (742 refuted 'single missing mechanism=MECH-457'; deficit UPSTREAM of the actor-critic head). DIAGNOSTIC -> excluded from governance scoring; route to /failure-autopsy before any governance action; MECH-457 stays candidate/v3_pending. Same-question 742 floor re-pose REFUSED (a different mechanism per leg). GOV-REUSE-1: decisive readout recorded in NO prior manifest (742 was z_world+sparse only) -> run. phase3-queue snapshot-race: verify git show --stat HEAD before push.

items.title: MECH-457 bias_head_baseline MINT -- order-independent reuse insurance for the V3-EXQ-742 OFF arm (724-A0 all-ON; D0+D3; baseline)
items.note: Separate baseline mint for the MECH-457 actor-critic ON/OFF lineage's reusable OFF arm (bias_head_baseline = 724-A0 all-ON incompetence control), banked ORDER-INDEPENDENTLY of V3-EXQ-742. Both this mint and the 742 consumer build the OFF cell + its fingerprint from the ONE shared module experiments/_lib/baselines/exq742_mech457_bias_head_baseline.py (run_off_cell + off_path_config_slice), include_driver_script_in_hash=False on both sides -> arm_fingerprint MATCHES by construction (verified: reuse-lookup key 4c316086... identical consumer-vs-mint). PINNED ree-cloud-4 (linux-x86_64-py3.10) so the fingerprint is the reusable cloud machine-class (a Mac mint would be a dead-on-arrival different class). LOW priority (5) so real science preempts. experiment_purpose=baseline, claim_ids=[] -> excluded from governance scoring; PROMOTES/DEMOTES NOTHING. A future MECH-457 iteration cites this run_id via reuse_baseline_from to skip re-training the byte-identical OFF arm. Corrects the parent session's initial wrongly-skipped separate mint (terminality unknowable; first-of-lineage is the paradigm mint case). Smoke PASS + validate_experiments --strict OK 2026-07-12.
